description:
# Robust Authentication & Token Refresh

Implement reliable authentication with AWS Cognito integration, robust token refresh mechanism with retry logic, session management, and graceful handling of expired tokens. Includes fallback mechanisms for offline authentication.

## Rationale
Addresses technical debt (token refresh marked as TODO) and critical competitor pain point: TripIt login problems where users get logged out and can't log back in (pain-1-2). Also addresses competitor authentication issues (pain-3-5). Reliable auth is foundational for all user-specific features.

## User Stories
- As a user, I want to stay logged in so that I don't have to repeatedly sign in
- As a user, I want the app to handle token refresh automatically so that my session doesn't interrupt my usage
- As a user, I want helpful error messages if login fails so that I know how to fix the issue

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Users can log in, register, and reset passwords reliably
- [ ] Token refresh happens automatically in the background without user awareness
- [ ] Expired tokens trigger retry mechanism with exponential backoff
- [ ] Users remain logged in across app restarts within session validity
- [ ] Clear error messages guide users when authentication fails
- [ ] Offline authentication allows access to cached data during network issues

phases.title: Token Refresh Foundation
phases.description: Create core token refresh infrastructure with retry logic and mutex to prevent race conditions

subtasks.title: Create Token Refresh Service
subtasks.description: Implement a centralized TokenRefreshService that manages token refresh operations with retry logic, exponential backoff, and mutex to prevent concurrent refresh attempts
acceptanceCriteria: TokenRefreshService class created with refresh method
Mutex pattern prevents multiple simultaneous refresh attempts
Emits refresh status events via Stream

subtasks.title: Implement Token Expiration Tracker
subtasks.description: Create a service that tracks token expiration time and triggers proactive refresh before expiration
acceptanceCriteria: Triggers refresh at 75% of token lifetime
Handles edge cases (missing expiration, already expired)

subtasks.title: Create Refresh Queue Manager
subtasks.description: Implement a queue to manage pending token refresh requests and prevent duplicate refresh attempts
acceptanceCriteria: Queues refresh requests when refresh is in progress
Resolves all queued requests with same result

subtasks.title: Update AuthRepository with Refresh Service
subtasks.description: Integrate TokenRefreshService into AuthRepository to replace simple refresh with robust refresh logic
acceptanceCriteria: AuthRepository uses TokenRefreshService instead of direct refresh
Maintains backward compatibility with existing interface
Updates session storage after successful refresh

subtasks.title: Add Unit Tests for Refresh Logic
subtasks.description: Write comprehensive unit tests for token refresh service, expiration tracker, and queue manager
acceptanceCriteria: Tests for mutex preventing concurrent refreshes
Tests for error handling and retries

phases.title: Background Token Refresh
phases.description: Implement automatic background token refresh to keep sessions alive without user awareness

subtasks.title: Create Token Refresh Scheduler
subtasks.description: Implement a background scheduler that triggers token refresh based on expiration time
acceptanceCriteria: Schedules refresh at 75% of token lifetime
Respects app lifecycle (pauses when app is backgrounded)
Wakes up when app returns to foreground
Handles edge cases (app killed, network loss)

subtasks.title: Integrate with App Lifecycle
subtasks.description: Connect token refresh scheduler with app lifecycle events (foreground, background, terminate)
acceptanceCriteria: Pauses refresh timer when app goes to background
Resumes refresh timer when app returns to foreground
Triggers immediate refresh check on app resume

subtasks.title: Update AuthInterceptor for Proactive Refresh
subtasks.description: Modify AuthInterceptor to check token expiration before making requests and trigger refresh if needed
acceptanceCriteria: Checks token expiration before each request
Triggers refresh if token expires in < 5 minutes
Waits for in-progress refresh before proceeding

subtasks.title: Add Refresh Notifications
subtasks.description: Implement user-facing notifications for token refresh events (silent success, visible failures)
acceptanceCriteria: User-friendly error message on refresh failure
Option to retry or re-authenticate on failure

subtasks.title: Add Integration Tests for Background Refresh
subtasks.description: Write integration tests to verify background refresh behavior across app lifecycle events
acceptanceCriteria: Tests for concurrent request handling during refresh

phases.title: Session Persistence
phases.description: Implement persistent session storage and restoration across app restarts

subtasks.title: Create Persistent Session Manager
subtasks.description: Implement a service that manages session persistence using secure storage
acceptanceCriteria: Saves tokens with expiration timestamp on successful auth
Loads and validates session on app startup

subtasks.title: Implement Session Validation Logic
subtasks.description: Add logic to validate stored sessions and determine if refresh or re-authentication is needed
acceptanceCriteria: Validates token expiration on session load
Attempts refresh if token expired < 24 hours ago
Requires re-authentication if token expired > 24 hours ago
Handles missing or corrupted session data

subtasks.title: Update Auth Provider with Session Restoration
subtasks.description: Modify AuthProvider to restore session on app initialization and keep user logged in
acceptanceCriteria: Updates auth state based on session validity
Triggers background refresh if session is valid but expiring soon
Redirects to login if session is invalid

subtasks.title: Add Integration Tests for Session Persistence
subtasks.description: Write tests to verify session persistence across app restarts and various scenarios
acceptanceCriteria: Tests for session save and load
Tests for auto-refresh on app restart

phases.title: Error Handling & User Experience
phases.description: Implement comprehensive error handling and provide clear user feedback for auth failures

subtasks.title: Create Auth Error Handler
subtasks.description: Implement a centralized error handler that categorizes auth errors and provides appropriate user messages
acceptanceCriteria: Categorizes errors: network, credentials, expired, rate limit, server
Maps error codes to user-friendly messages
Suggests actionable steps for each error type

subtasks.title: Implement Retry UI Component
subtasks.description: Create a reusable UI component for auth retry with exponential backoff visualization
acceptanceCriteria: Shows countdown for next retry attempt

subtasks.title: Add Auth Error Screens
subtasks.description: Create dedicated screens for common auth error scenarios with helpful guidance
acceptanceCriteria: NetworkErrorScreen with retry and offline mode options

subtasks.title: Update Auth Screens with Error Handling
subtasks.description: Enhance existing auth screens (login, register) with improved error display and recovery options
acceptanceCriteria: Login screen shows user-friendly error messages
Register screen validates input and shows clear errors
Forgot password screen provides status feedback

subtasks.title: Add Widget Tests for Error UI
subtasks.description: Write widget tests for auth error screens and retry components

phases.title: Offline Authentication Support
phases.description: Implement fallback mechanisms for offline authentication and cached data access

subtasks.title: Create Offline Auth Manager
subtasks.description: Implement a service that manages offline authentication state and cached data access
acceptanceCriteria: Provides access to cached data when offline
Syncs with server when connection restored

subtasks.title: Implement Cached Data Access
subtasks.description: Create a read-only data access layer for offline mode using cached user data
acceptanceCriteria: Returns cached user profile when offline
Returns cached trip data when offline

subtasks.title: Add Offline Mode UI Indicator
subtasks.description: Create a UI component that indicates when the app is in offline mode
acceptanceCriteria: Shows in app bar when offline

subtasks.title: Implement Sync on Reconnect
subtasks.description: Add logic to automatically sync data and refresh tokens when network connection is restored

subtasks.title: Add Integration Tests for Offline Scenarios
subtasks.description: Write tests to verify offline authentication behavior and sync on reconnect
acceptanceCriteria: Tests for token refresh after reconnection

phases.title: Testing & Documentation
phases.description: Complete end-to-end testing, performance optimization, and documentation

subtasks.title: Write End-to-End Auth Tests
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive E2E tests covering complete auth flows including refresh, persistence, and error scenarios
acceptanceCriteria: E2E test for complete login flow
E2E test for token refresh during API call
E2E test for session restoration after app restart
E2E test for logout and re-login
E2E test for offline to online transition

subtasks.title: Performance Testing & Optimization
subtasks.description: Test auth performance under various conditions and optimize bottlenecks

subtasks.title: Write Auth Documentation
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive documentation for auth system architecture, usage, and troubleshooting

subtasks.title: Create Migration Guide
subtasks.description: Document migration path from existing auth implementation to new robust auth system

subtasks.title: Final QA & Bug Fixes
subtasks.description: Conduct final QA testing and fix any remaining bugs
